files.notes: This file contains the end of the Current Topics article by James H. Anderson and the complete In the Kitchen Laboratory article by Hazel Love Dunford. The Current Topics section ends mid-sentence discussing national relations, while the Kitchen Laboratory section is complete with Christmas-themed cooking advice and recipes.

files.notes: This file contains the Editorial section followed by the Guide Lessons section. The Editorial includes both the main editorial content and a section on Genealogical Classes. The Guide Lessons section contains multiple lessons (Theology, Work and Business, Genealogy and Art, Home Economics) but appears to be cut off mid-sentence in the Art section's twilight study.
